title: ctenitis hirta
intro: Ctenitis hirta is a species of fern native to tropical Asia, characterized by its hairy rhizomes and lance-shaped fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Studies have shown that Ctenitis hirta has various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
